text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From here on, we'll have our sights set on the
Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the Satsuki Sho, she told me that she
couldn't promise she would enter. But now...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... Phew!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oddly enough, she's been showing up to every
training session and giving it her all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What do you mean? Oh, are you referring to
my perfect attendance rate as of recently?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Isn't that a given? I want to run faster in races!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Well, I am one, aren't I?
choice_data_list:
But what about your "no guarantees" for the
Japanese Derby?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Not making a promise is not the same as saying
no.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
One must be prepared for any and all occasions,
don't you agree?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As always, I find myself unable to decipher her
true intentions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But in any case, I can consider her proactive
attitude towards training a good thing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're about to finish training when I see Agnes
Tachyon staring off into the distance.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: My, my. It appears that she's still around.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Cafe! What business do you have?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I've noticed your passionate stare for some time
now. If you're waiting to confess your love, why
don't we relocate to the back of the school, or
perhaps the rooftop?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: That's not why...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I just thought... you were running... a little
different than usual.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...Hmm?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon's eyes flicker back and forth at
Manhattan Cafe's words.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But her hesitation soon turns into a mischievous
smile.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
So you've been studying me with quite some
intent. Heh-heh-heh, you're making me blush!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Don't misunderstand. I was just...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's okay, there's no need to be embarrassed! I
know exactly how you feel! Let me guess, you
wanted to assist in my research, didn't y—

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I just thought studying you... might help me...
catch up to my friend!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
That's why... I've been watching... That's the only
reason.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hmm? Is that so?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
But... on second thought... I think this doesn't
really concern me. Goodbye.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe turns to leave, but Agnes
Tachyon stops her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Your assertion is not exactly true!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I am betting a part of my future on you.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: To be honest, I have high hopes for you both—you and your invisible "friend."

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
In the beginning, I thought we were fellow
outcasts... I was wrong.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
How should I put it? You seem to possess all of
what I do not.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I even think to myself how interesting it might be
to mimic your lifestyle.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Please... I don't want to be a part of this.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Well then, I should be on my way too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stop her as she's about to leave. There's
something I need to clarify—well, there's a whole
slew of things, but... first things first.
choice_data_list:
What did she mean by you running differently
from the rest?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon takes a moment to think it over,
but then shrugs her shoulders.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Well, nothing rings a bell.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Moving onto more important topics, guinea pig.
About our next race...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Judging from today's condition, I have a good
feeling about the Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Absolutely. I'm in high spirits lately.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
So let's quit mulling over ambiguities and focus
on the race!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
For the sake of science as well, let's begin
drawing up plans as soon as tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Agnes Tachyon leaves on that high note.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few things remain unclear, but with a
declaration that bold, I'm sure she won't back out
of the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I pump myself up for the upcoming summer stage.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You know, the Japanese Derby will be a tad
difficult. To tell you the truth, I can't muster up
the motivation.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ow, my ears. Don't shout at me like that. I want
to run. I'm trying to collect data here, after all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Which is why I've decided to run in the NHK Mile
Cup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The NHK Mile C.—a mile-long G1 race taking
place in the beginning of summer.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: With a distance like that, my...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Agnes Tachyon trails off mid-sentence.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing. Regardless, next up is the NHK Mile
C., got it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still feeling left out of the loop, I assure myself
she won't rescind her declaration to run in the
NHK Mile C...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While the goal has shifted, I refocus and rekindle
my motivation for the upcoming race.
